visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts and ties sit side by side in chairs, facing each other; the man on the left wears a uniform with visible insignia. Both are leaning slightly forward, appearing engaged in conversation, with their heads turned toward one another. The background includes a framed picture on the wall and a dark-colored chair behind them.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace, accompanied by a slight gasp at the beginning.
